name: WebMbrDmLoadRunCycUpd_EE

text.value: WITH cte_getRows AS ( SELECT SUBJ_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, RUN_CYC_NO, RUN_CYC_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC WHERE (SUBJ_CD = 'MEMBERSHIP' AND TRGT_SYS_CD = 'IDS' AND RUN_CYC_NO >= @{pipeline().parameters.IDSMbrExtractRunCycle} AND CDM_LOAD_IN = 'N') OR (SUBJ_CD = 'BEKEY' AND TRGT_SYS_CD = 'IDS' AND RUN_CYC_NO >= @{pipeline().parameters.IDSBekeyExtractRunCycle} AND CDM_LOAD_IN = 'N') ), cte_xfm_Businesslogic AS ( SELECT SUBJ_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, RUN_CYC_NO, RUN_CYC_SK, 'Y' AS CDM_LOAD_IN FROM cte_getRows ) UPDATE T SET T.CDM_LOAD_IN = S.CDM_LOAD_IN FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC T JOIN cte_xfm_Businesslogic S ON T.SUBJ_CD = S.SUBJ_CD AND T.SRC_SYS_CD = S.SRC_SYS_CD AND T.TRGT_SYS_CD = S.TRGT_SYS_CD AND T.RUN_CYC_NO = S.RUN_CYC_NO

Description:
COPYRIGHT 2010, 2022 BLUE CROSS/BLUE SHIELD OF KANSAS CITY 


JOB NAME:     WebIhmAnalyticsRunCycUpd

CALLED BY:    IDSMbrshDmIndvBePopHlthRelValCntl


DESCRIPTION:    Update the P_RUN_CYC table CDM load indicator fields to show those records have been copied to the Claim Data Mart.
      

PROCESSING:  Extract the maximum run cycle from IDS run cycle table.  Update the CM_LOAD_IN field in the IDS P_RUN_CYCLE table for all source, subject, and target run cycles that are equal or less.


MODIFICATIONS:                         Project/Altiris

                              2022-06-01      Parallel conversion
Hugh Sisson          2022-07-13      Prod Fix                 Combined two data flows into one.                                                       IntegrateDev2                 Goutham K                  7/14/2022
                                                                                    Modified query in db2_P_RUN_CYC_in to extract both 
                                                                                    MEMBERSHIP and BEKEY run cycle.

Annotations:
Run Cycle Extract Update
Update the P_RUN_CYC table to indicate source system data has been loaded to the Web Data Mart for each of the Membership and BEKey run cycles processed.
Job Name;
WebIhmAnalyticsRunCycUpd_EE
